facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight to the supermarket chains. Locals go to the day market on Đường Ngô Quyền. Fresh produce, local snacks, real Phu Quoc prices. No English signs, no tourist markup. Just the island shopping the way it actually shops. 49 Đường Ngô Quyền, khu phố 4. Get there early. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Ducking into the local day market on Đường Ngô Quyền. Stalls packed with fresh fish, tropical fruit, and snacks you won't find at the resort shop. This is where Phu Quoc actually buys its groceries.

instagram.caption: Locals don't queue at the supermarket chains. They go here. Day market, 49 Đường Ngô Quyền. Real prices, real Phu Quoc. Save this.
instagram.video_caption: Real Phu Quoc grocery run. Fresh fish, local fruit, zero tourist markup. Day market on Đường Ngô Quyền.

tiktok.caption: The market Phu Quoc locals actually use. No tourist tax here. 49 Đường Ngô Quyền #PhuQuoc #PhuQuocTips #VietnamTravel #LocalMarket

scenes: Exterior shot: market entrance, Đường Ngô Quyền sign visible
Vendors arranging fresh fish on ice
